name: Email Validation API
tagline: Validate 50K emails for $9.99 flat — ZeroBounce charges $400 for the same volume
description: Email validation API: MX check, 500+ disposable blocklist, typo fix. $9.99/50K flat vs ZeroBounce $400. Free 500/mo.
long_description:
## Save $390/mo vs ZeroBounce at 50K Emails
Flat-rate email validation instead of per-email billing. Validate 50,000 emails for $9.99/mo. ZeroBounce charges $400 for the same volume. Hunter.io charges $4,900.

## Every Validation Includes All Checks
- **MX record verification** via DNS-over-HTTPS (no emails sent)
- **Disposable email detection** against 500+ domains (Mailinator, Guerrilla, 10MinuteMail)
- **Typo correction** (gmial.com -> gmail.com, yaho.com -> yahoo.com)
- **Role-based detection** (admin@, info@, support@, noreply@)
- **Free provider detection** (Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook)
- **Confidence score** 0-100 for easy filtering

## Cost Comparison
| Volume | This API | ZeroBounce | Hunter.io |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|
| 500/mo | **FREE** | $0 (100 free) | $0 (25 free) |
| 50K/mo | **$9.99** | $400 | $4,900 |
| 500K/mo | **$29.99** | $4,000 | N/A |

## Use Cases
- **SaaS signup forms**: Block disposable emails, catch typos before account creation
- **Email marketing**: Clean lists before campaigns to protect sender reputation
- **E-commerce checkout**: Ensure order confirmations reach customers
- **Lead generation**: Score leads by email quality (corporate vs free vs disposable)
- **Fraud prevention**: Block trial farming with disposable email detection

## Quick Start
```
GET /validate?email=user@gmial.com
→ {"valid": true, "suggestion": "user@gmail.com", "score": 85}
```

## Bulk Validation
```
POST /validate/bulk
{"emails": ["user1@gmail.com", "fake@mailinator.com"]}
```
Up to 50 emails per request.

Free tier: 500 validations/month. No credit card required.
